title: T-054 — E2E exception gates: blocked release, allergen, over-consumption, completion failure
prompt:
# T-054 — E2E exception gates: blocked release, allergen, over-consumption, completion failure

PRD/UX refs: §1.1A, SCR-08-03, MODAL-08-05, MODAL-08-04

Goal: Create Playwright coverage and artifact evidence for E2E exception gates: blocked release, allergen, over-consumption, completion failure.

Implementation details:
Cover negative flows: missing active IDs block Start, allergen required redirects, over-consumption requires approval, and closed_production_strict failure requires Production Manager override. Tests must capture screenshots and retain trace.zip/video artifacts under test-results or configured Playwright output. Use deterministic seed fixtures and clean up org-scoped data after each run.

Scope files:
- apps/web/e2e/production.spec.ts [create/modify]
- apps/web/e2e/fixtures/production.ts [create/modify]
- apps/web/playwright.config.ts [modify if artifact retention missing]

Acceptance criteria:
1. Playwright test covers the named flow with deterministic seeded data
2. Assertions verify UI state, server-side data changes, and typed blocker/audit evidence
3. Closeout includes screenshot paths and Playwright trace artifact paths

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.

test_strategy: RED: write Playwright spec that fails before target UI/API slices exist
GREEN: run pnpm --filter web exec playwright test production.spec.ts --trace=on
risk_red_lines: Do not treat D365 sync/export/Built as production release source-of-truth
Do not bypass 04-PLANNING WO snapshot or 03-TECHNICAL active factory spec/BOM approval

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Technical BOM/factory_spec approval emits factory-use state.
Planning snapshots active_bom_header_id and active_factory_spec_id onto WOs.
